notes: ASIOA 0.2.9 keeps PowerShell and helper commands hidden, moves device discovery to a background worker so the control panel opens faster, adds ASIO registry discovery for ASIO4ALL, ReaRoute, and other installed ASIO drivers, and writes a readable control-panel log under AppData. The packaged ASIO driver still registers for ASIO-capable hosts; Windows-visible speaker and microphone endpoints remain the next native endpoint-driver milestone.
